if using pollux-castor in a dtide stage, which is better posse for them? Bleeding Heart or Derision of Destiny? I know Sin marks is important but i personally dk how impactful it is to priority it over everything else
hm, sin marks stacks how much bleed you'll inflict on enemies, while derision of destiny drawing cards means you can pull plumes from your deck into your hand
depends on how you're wanting to play the team I suppose
Generally you want to maximise your main dps damage
So if you invested in pollux, use his posse
The 25% crit damage is pretty big
It's especially good if you have  OE pollux
